user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty traditional breakfast featuring scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, golden hash browns, and buttered toast.
fields.meal_suggestion: Whisk three eggs with a splash of milk and scramble in butter until fluffy. Serve alongside three strips of crispy oven-baked bacon and a side of shredded potato hash browns browned in a skillet. Accompany with two slices of whole-grain toast and a small side of fresh fruit.
fields.nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; whole-grain toast offers complex carbohydrates and fiber. While higher in sodium due to bacon, it provides a high-satiety start to the day.

result.reasoning: The user requested a classic American breakfast for the Father's 'Greek food filled day' (Day 7). Position -1 appends this new option to the existing breakfast list for Day 7, which currently includes Banana Bread Toast and a Fruit & Nut Plate.
